meta.title: First Look Inside SpaceX's Starfactory w/ Elon Musk
meta.description:
Part 2 is live now! - https://youtu.be/InJOlT6WdHc

Join Elon Musk for a tour inside SpaceX's Starbase and the brand new Starfactory. This video was shot the day before Flight 4, on June 5th, 2024.

00:00 - Intro
00:28 - Interview Starts
10:12 - Starships in Highbay
21:24 - Manufacturing talk
23:50 - Reusability
27:00 - Ice / Thruster talk
31:30 - Megabay
41:15 - Raptors
49:07 - Inside Starfactory
1:03:03 - Outro

Become a Patreon Supporter, YouTube Member or X Subscriber for review access to Part 2 now! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Search "Everyday Astronaut" wherever you stream music!
